answers: Plant care basics: right light, proper watering (check soil before watering), good drainage, and occasional fertilizing.
Watering tip: stick finger 1 inch into soil — if dry, water. Most plants die from overwatering, not underwatering.
Light needs vary: succulents need bright direct sun, ferns like indirect light, snake plants tolerate low light.
Gach er jotno: thik moto roud dao, onek beshhi pani dio na, drainage hole thakuk, ar maje maje sar dao.
